title.text: Flood Economic Losses by State, Malaysia (2025)
title.subtitle: RM Million — darker colour indicates higher losses

transform.calculate: datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Kuala Lumpur' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.6 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Putrajaya' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.8 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Selangor' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.5 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Melaka' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.7 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Negeri Sembilan' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.6 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Pulau Pinang' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.5 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Perlis' ? datum.properties.center_lon - 0.4 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Kedah' ? datum.properties.center_lon + 0.2 : datum.properties.center_lon

datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Kuala Lumpur' ? datum.properties.center_lat + 0.3 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Putrajaya' ? datum.properties.center_lat - 0.3 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Melaka' ? datum.properties.center_lat - 0.3 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Negeri Sembilan' ? datum.properties.center_lat + 0.2 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Pulau Pinang' ? datum.properties.center_lat + 0.4 : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Perlis' ? datum.properties.center_lat + 0.4 : datum.properties.center_lat

datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Kuala Lumpur' ? 'W.P. KL' : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'W.P. Putrajaya' ? 'Putrajaya' : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Negeri Sembilan' ? 'N. Sembilan' : datum.properties.adm1_name == 'Pulau Pinang' ? 'P. Pinang' : datum.properties.adm1_name
